description: Opt-in PostToolUse reminder that fires after source files change, nudging you to keep specs, READMEs, ADRs, runbooks, and .claude/templates artifacts in sync. Advisory only (never blocks). Copy the `hooks` block into .claude/settings.json to activate.

hooks.command: echo '[docs-sync-check] Source changed. Update affected docs (specs, README, ADRs, runbooks) and keep .claude/templates artifacts current. See .claude/skills/documentation/SKILL.md.' >&2; exit 0
